title: Preparing Europe’s Workforce for the Age of AI [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Artificial intelligence is already reshaping labour markets. The real question is not whether change will happen, but how prepared societies are. Governments, businesses and individuals must act now to develop skills, strengthen competitiveness and ensure technological change benefits everyone.
